scores.correctness_notes: The agent uses v2.ingress while the gold standard recommends v1.ingress. The agent does not show the actual relation data schema (application-data/unit-data bags) that the gold standard emphasises as the key content. However, the Python API demonstrated (IngressPerAppRequirer, events) is broadly correct.
scores.hallucination_notes: none — IngressPerAppRequirer, on.ready, on.revoked, IngressPerAppReadyEvent, IngressPerAppRevokedEvent, and event.url all exist in the traefik-k8s ingress library
